title: Eternal Attributes
description: Attribute Library for the Prominence modpack and its custom content mods.
body:
![Eternal Attributes Banner](https://github.com/nvb-uy/cdn/blob/main/desc/Eternal_Attributes/eternal_attributes_banner.png?raw=true)

Eternal Attributes is a library mod that provides attributes shared within various mods, such as Eldritch End, Death Knights and Prominece II RPG.

These attributes are based on the lore of the Prominence universe; adding the Eternal and Primordial powers.
